title: payment — HTTP routes
description: Tenant-facing payment surface (customer routes for own payment methods + intents + payments + own dispute status; admin+finance for provider CRUD + captures + dispute management) + public webhook plane (per-provider HMAC-verified inbound) + platform-admin cross-tenant support routes. Every tenant-plane route carries `entitlement.enforce:payment_capture` at minimum. Payments are NEVER created via API — captures happen via PaymentIntent.succeeded transition. Attempted POST /payments returns 403 PAYMENT_MANUAL_CREATE_FORBIDDEN.

groups.name: tenant-payment-intents-customer
groups.description: Customer + admin payment intent lifecycle. Customer creates + confirms; admin can also do it on behalf.

routes.description: Body: { invoice_id, amount_cents?, currency?, capture_method?, confirmation_method?, payment_method_id? }. Returns { id, client_secret, next_action_type?, next_action_url? }. Customer's SDK uses client_secret to confirm client-side.
Includes status + next_action_* when requires_action. client_secret returned only when caller owns the intent.
Body: { payment_method_id? }. Dispatches ConfirmPaymentIntentJob.
Body: { reason?, note? }. Refused when status IS terminal.

groups.name: tenant-payments-customer
groups.description: Customer read + admin management of payments.

routes.description: Customer's own payments (auto-scoped by invoice.customer_id). filter[from], filter[to], filter[provider], filter[status]. Default sort: captured_at DESC.
Admin + finance tenant-wide view. filter[customer_id], filter[provider], filter[status], filter[from], filter[to], filter[invoice_id]. Default sort: captured_at DESC.
Body: { amount_cents? }. Dispatches CapturePaymentIntentJob. Requires payment_manual_capture entitlement. Refused when intent.capture_method != 'manual' or status != 'requires_capture'.

groups.name: tenant-payment-methods-customer
groups.description: Saved payment method CRUD. Customer manages own; admin can view + soft-delete tenant-wide.

routes.description: Customer's own saved methods. filter[is_active], filter[provider], filter[method_type]. Default sort: is_default DESC, last_used_at DESC.

SetupIntent flow — customer's client-side SDK provides the tokenized payment method reference. Body: { provider, provider_reference_id, method_type, brand?, last4?, exp_month?, exp_year?, fingerprint_hash, billing_address?, is_default? }. Duplicate fingerprint returns 409 with existing method_id.
Atomic lock-and-swap for is_default flag. Refused when method.is_active=false.
Soft-delete + dispatch provider-side detach. Refused when method is referenced by an in-flight PaymentIntent.

groups.name: tenant-payment-disputes
groups.description: Dispute lifecycle management. Admin + finance manage evidence + accept-vs-fight decisions.

routes.description: filter[status], filter[provider], filter[reason], filter[from], filter[to]. Default sort: opened_at DESC. Unresolved first.
Evidence field returned encrypted; support role sees redacted view (evidence fields nulled).
Dispatches SubmitDisputeEvidenceJob. Body: { override_evidence?: { ... } } — optional overrides on the auto-collected evidence pack.
Body: { note }. Dispatches refund via the refund module + transitions dispute → 'charge_refunded'. --note required (audit trail).

groups.name: tenant-payment-providers
groups.description: Provider config CRUD. Admin + owner only.

routes.description: filter[provider], filter[is_active]. Config field returned encrypted; support role sees redacted view.
Body: PaymentProviderConfigCreateData. config jsonb validated against the per-provider JSON Schema in data/providers/. Consumes 1 unit of payment_provider_slot.
Send a synthetic test event via the provider's sandbox endpoint. Body: { test_mode?: boolean }. Returns test result (succeeded / failed) + latency.
Trigger on-demand reconciliation for this provider. Returns { intents_polled, drift_count, reconciled_count }.

groups.name: webhook-payment-providers
groups.description: Public webhook plane. Per-provider inbound endpoints. HMAC-verified per provider signing scheme. NO auth guard — the HMAC IS the auth. Every request writes a PaymentWebhookReceived audit trail row regardless of signature validity.

routes.description: Dispatches to the provider's handler (StripeWebhookHandler, PaddleWebhookHandler, etc.). Handlers are idempotent — same webhook fired twice creates zero duplicates (deduplication key = provider_event_id). Returns 200 with empty body when accepted. Returns 400 on signature-invalid (no body echoed).
filter[tenant_id], filter[provider], filter[status], filter[from], filter[to]. Cross-tenant scan for support debugging.
Cross-tenant P1 review dashboard. filter[tenant_id], filter[status], filter[provider], filter[unresolved].
